storyboard_markdown:
# Scene Contract: CH001_SC002

## Production Intent
The scene serves as the primary driver for the plot by introducing the gold claim. It requires a balance of expansive landscape photography to establish the remote Arizona setting and intimate, detailed shots of the quartz vein to ground the discovery in physical reality. The transition from the high of the discovery to the gravity of the logistical plan must be reflected in the performances and pacing.

## Required Cast
- John Carter (Younger)
- Captain James K. Powell

## Required Environments
- Remote Arizona quartz vein/hills

## Continuity Constraints
- **The Vein:** The visual appearance, size, and placement of the gold-bearing quartz must remain consistent across all coverage.
- **Period Wardrobe:** All clothing and gear must strictly adhere to 1865 prospector standards.
- **Lighting:** Must maintain the high-contrast, bright aesthetic of a desert sun.

## Beat List
- BT001: Discovery of the massive gold-bearing quartz vein.
- BT002: Inspection of the vein and shared moment of triumph/excitement.
- BT003: Strategic planning: Powell agrees to head to civilization for machinery; Carter commits to guarding the site.
